hero.subtitle: Scroll like TikTok, swipe like Tinder, find your next home. Roomi connects people looking for apartments with apartments looking for people. No agents, no hassle.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: A full-screen vertical feed with apartments tailored just for you. Scroll, watch, discover new listings all the time.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Found an apartment you love? Hit like! The host gets notified and can check out your profile.
howItWorks.step3Desc: When both sides like each other, it's a match! Start chatting and schedule a viewing.

features.title: Why Roomi?
features.f1Desc: A TikTok-style vertical feed that learns what you're looking for and shows apartments that match you perfectly
features.f2Desc: Talk directly with hosts after matching, no need to hunt for phone numbers
features.f3Desc: Get invitations to open houses and schedule visits with one tap
features.f4Desc: Tell your story, share your lifestyle, and find a real match
features.f5Desc: View apartments on the map and discover new neighborhoods that fit you
features.f6Desc: Direct connection between renters and hosts. No fees, no middlemen

cities.title: Our Cities
cities.subtitle: Roomi is active in Israel's major cities. More coming soon!
cities.tlvDesc: Florentin, Neve Tzedek, Old North and more
cities.jlmDesc: Nachlaot, City Center, Rehavia and more
cities.beerDesc: Old City, Ramot, Neve Ze'ev and more

cta.title: Be the First to Try Roomi
cta.subtitle: We're building a better way to find roommates and apartments. Join the waitlist and get early access when we launch.
cta.note: Free to join. No spam, ever.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes! Roomi is completely free for renters and hosts. No fees, no hidden charges.
faq.a2: When you like an apartment, the host gets notified. If they like you back — it's a match and you can start chatting.
faq.a3: Of course! Sign up as a host, upload photos and details, and your apartment appears in the feed for matching renters.
faq.a4: Yes, all users go through a verification process. We make sure profiles are real so you feel safe.
faq.a5: Currently we're active in Tel Aviv, Jerusalem, Haifa and Beer Sheva. More cities coming!
faq.q6: How is Roomi different from Facebook groups?
faq.a6: Instead of scrolling through hundreds of posts, Roomi has a personalized feed, two-way matching, built-in chat, and verified profiles. A complete experience in one place.

footer.tagline: Tinder for apartments, TikTok experience. Find roommates and apartments in Israel.
